Interface Attackable

All Known Implementing Classes:
FireAttack, IceAttack, NormalAttack, WindAttack
public interface Attackable
Strategy interface for all attack types. Each implementation defines immediate damage and provides metadata (name, cooldown) used by Controller for selection and cooldown management.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    attack(BasePlayer enemy)
    Applies this attack's immediate effect to the target.
    int
    getCooldown()
    Returns the number of turns before this attack may be used again.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the unique name identifier for this attack (e.g.

  • Method Details

    • attack

      void attack(BasePlayer enemy)
      Applies this attack's immediate effect to the target.
      Parameters:
      enemy - the player receiving the attack

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the unique name identifier for this attack (e.g. "FIRE").
      Returns:
      attack name

    • getCooldown

      int getCooldown()
      Returns the number of turns before this attack may be used again.
      Returns:
      cooldown in turns; 0 means no cooldown
